ROUTE_LOCK_ENFORCE.comment: #Jul08 (Gill): OWNER DECISION - default OFF, forever. The paperwork layer (certification/cleanliness/permission manifest) may TAG days clean or dirty for scoring, but it never blocks an order again. Real-risk gates (caps, dilution, volume, session, regime, PnL
ROUTE_LOCK_ENFORCE.name: ROUTE_LOCK_ENFORCE

TRADE_PERMISSION_ENFORCE.comment: #Jul08 (Gill): OWNER DECISION, final - the certification/cleanliness paperwork may tag and score days, but it never blocks an order again. ("If the days are not clean, they are not clean - let the thing trade.") Note: this was True for ~90 minutes this morning
TRADE_PERMISSION_ENFORCE.name: TRADE_PERMISSION_ENFORCE

operator_read: Bot gate audit found no active daily entry bypass, but enforcement switches are disabled/overridden; treat resulting trades as experiment evidence until those switches are restored.
